summary: Diff implements local saved-scan persistence via localStorage (useSavedScans), adds a SavedScansGallery with empty state, thumbnails, dates, open/delete actions, and a delete confirmation dialog, and adds a PhotoScanner delete handler and save-to-gallery flow. Some accessibility/visibility details for the in-scanner delete control are not verifiable due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Delete/trash icon control is visible when a photo is loaded and is accessible (keyboard + screen reader label).
missing_requirements.reason: PhotoScanner.tsx shows a delete handler and imports Trash2, but the truncated diff does not show the actual UI control rendering (icon button) nor any aria-label/screen-reader text to confirm accessibility and visibility conditions.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notifications for delete/download/save actions (e.g., 'Photo cleared', 'Photo downloaded', 'Scan saved to gallery').
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask for toast notifications; these are additional UX behaviors beyond the specified requirements.
